data.name: S_APK_ICON_LIC
data.value: Ikona APK je chráněna licencí Apache License, verze 2.0.

data.name: S_MISSING_ADB_OVERRIDE
data.value: Nelze načíst verzi ADB z uvedeného umístění.

data.name: S_ADB_VERSION_LOW_OVERRIDE
data.value: ADB verze z uvedené cesty je zastaralá.

data.name: S_ROOT_FORBID
data.value: Na vybraném zařízení nelze povolit přístup k root právům.

data.name: S_NEW_DEVICE_TIP
data.value: Spárovat a/nebo se připojit k WiFi zařízení (bez použití mDNS)

data.name: S_RESTART_APP
data.value: Restartujte aplikaci, aby se projevily změny

data.name: S_DISABLE_MDNS
data.value: Je třeba restartovat server ADB, aby se deaktivovala služba mDNS.

data.name: S_RESET_SETTINGS
data.value: Po zavření aplikace dojde k resetování všech nastavení. Tento krok nelze vrátit zpět. Opravdu chcete pokračovat?

data.name: S_WSA_LAUNCH
data.value: Pokud je ADB ve WSA již autorizováno, vyberte možnost Spustit. Chcete-li ADB povolit, otevřete pokročilá nastavení WSA.

data.name: S_NEW_VERSION
data.value: Nový {0} ve verzi {1} je k dispozici

data.name: S_ANDROID_ROBOT_LIC
data.value: The Android robot is reproduced or modified from work created and shared by Google and used according to terms described in the Creative Commons 3.0 Attribution License.

data.name: S_NEW_VERSION_MSG
data.value: Welcome to a new ADB Explorer version! The release notes are available on GitHub.

data.name: S_DRIVE_RESTRICTIONS_HEADER
data.comment: Header for the drive restrictions tooltip in the navigation bar

data.name: S_RESTRICTION_NOEXEC
data.value: • Symbolic links are not supported • File names cannot contain " * / : < > ? \ | • File names are case insensitive • Installation of APKs is not supported
data.comment: Restrictions bundled under the noexec mount option

data.name: S_WIN_ROOT_ILLEGAL
data.value: {0} of the selected files cannot be created under a Windows drive root.

data.name: S_PRIVACY_UPDATE_TITLE
data.comment: The title of the notification message about an updated privacy policy

data.name: S_PRIVACY_UPDATE_MSG
data.value: This app version was released after a privacy policy update. Review the changes on GitHub.
data.comment: The content of the privacy policy update notification message

data.name: S_HELP_ON_ADB
data.value: This app is a UI for ADB - Android Debug Bridge. To use the app, you need to have ADB on your PC. ADB is available as part of the Android SDK Platform Tools. You can use the provided link to download the SDK Platform Tools. Unfortunately, we cannot provide ADB with the app due to licensing restrictions.

data.name: S_DELETE_PERMANENT
data.value: The following will be permanently deleted: {0}

data.name: S_LS_ERROR
data.value: An error occurred while trying to list the contents of this folder. Visible content may be incomplete.

data.name: S_PASTE_ANCESTOR
data.value: {0} is an ancestor of the destination folder.

data.name: S_KILL_EMULATOR
data.value: Are you sure you want to kill this emulator?

data.name: S_REM_DEVICE
data.value: Are you sure you want to remove this device?

data.name: S_REM_DEVICE_TITLE
data.comment: 0 = Device name to remove

data.name: S_KILL_EMULATOR_TITLE
data.comment: 0 = Emulator name to kill

data.name: S_REM_APK_PLURAL
data.value: The following will be removed: {0} packages

data.name: S_SETTINGS_POLL_DEVICES
data.comment: The setting used to toggle polling for devices

data.name: S_SETTINGS_POLL_BATTERY
data.comment: The setting used to toggle battery status polling

data.name: S_SETTINGS_AUTO_ROOT
data.comment: The setting used to enable automatically enabling root when a device connects

data.name: S_SETTINGS_SAVE_DEVICES
data.comment: The setting used to toggle saving devices that were manually added

data.name: S_SETTINGS_AUTO_OPEN
data.comment: The setting used to toggle automatically opening the only connected device or the last connected device

data.name: S_SETTINGS_STOP_ON_SYNC
data.comment: The setting used to stop device and battery polling when there are active push or pull operations

data.name: S_SETTINGS_PARALLEL_OPERATIONS
data.comment: The setting used to allow performing simultaneous operations on separate devices

data.name: S_SETTINGS_MEDIA_RESCAN
data.comment: The setting used to enable forcing the device to perform a media rescan after a successful push operation batch

data.name: S_SETTINGS_POLL_DRIVES
data.comment: The setting used to toggle polling for device drives when in drive view

data.name: S_SETTINGS_SHOW_EXTENSIONS
data.comment: The setting used to enable showing file name extension

data.name: S_SETTINGS_HIDDEN_ITEMS
data.comment: The setting used to enable showing hidden items in the browser

data.name: S_SETTINGS_SYSTEM_APPS
data.comment: The setting used to allow displaying system apps in package view

data.name: S_SETTINGS_CUSTOM_ACCENT
data.comment: The setting to enable a custom accent color instead of the system accent

data.name: S_SETTINGS_ACCENT_COLOR
data.comment: The setting to choose a custom accent color

data.name: S_PICK_COLOR
data.comment: Title of the color picker dialog

data.name: S_SETTINGS_GROUP_WORK_DIRS
data.comment: The title of the settings group that defines the working directories

data.name: S_SETTINGS_GROUP_EXPLORER
data.comment: The title of the settings group that defines the explorer / browser behavior

data.name: S_APP_DATA_LOCATION_TITLE
data.comment: Title of the dialog asking packaged users where to store app data

data.name: S_APP_DATA_LOCATION_MESSAGE
data.value:
This app distribution saves data in a virtualized (and hard to reach) location, which is cleared on app uninstall.
Select Custom to use a location that will not be removed on uninstall. The custom location cannot be under C:\Users\…\AppData
data.comment: Explains virtualized vs custom app data location for packaged installs

data.name: S_APP_DATA_LOCATION_VIRTUALIZED
data.comment: Button to keep the MSIX virtualized app data folder

data.name: S_APP_DATA_LOCATION_CUSTOM
data.comment: Button to pick a non-virtualized custom app data folder

data.name: S_APP_DATA_LOCATION_BROWSE
data.comment: Title of the folder picker for custom app data location

data.name: S_PRIVACY_POLICY
data.comment: The title of the hyperlink to our privacy policy

data.name: S_SETTINGS_CRASH_DIALOG
data.comment: Toggle in About settings to show or hide the optional crash report dialog after an unhandled exception

data.name: S_CRASH_REPORTING_TITLE
data.comment: Title of the About settings notice describing optional crash reporting

data.name: S_CRASH_REPORTING_NOTICE
data.value: After a crash, you may optionally send a diagnostic report to help us fix it. Reports are sent only when you click Send Report and usually include the exception message, stack trace, app and Windows version, and the page that was open. The data is processed by Grafana Labs (Grafana Cloud). See the Privacy Policy link above.
data.comment: About settings notice describing optional crash reporting and Grafana as processor

data.name: S_ATTRIBUTIONS
data.comment: The title of the about section listing licenses

data.name: S_PLACEHOLDER_NOT_SET
data.comment: The placeholder text for a textbox whose value hasn't been set

data.name: S_SEARCH_VIEW
data.comment: The tooltip of the button used to show the settings search textbox

data.name: S_COLLAPSE_ALL
data.comment: The tooltip of the button used to collapse all settings groups

data.name: S_EXPAND_ALL
data.comment: The tooltip of the button used to expand all settings groups

data.name: S_FILTER_FILE_OPS
data.comment: The content of a button used to toggle file operations filtering

data.name: S_ENABLE_AUTO_PLAY
data.comment: The content of a button used to toggle automatic processing of the file operations

data.name: S_AUTO_PLAY_DISABLE
data.value: Disable Auto Play Cancel All Running
data.comment: The tooltip of the file operations auto play button in its alt state

data.name: S_LOG_UPDATES_PAUSE
data.comment: The tooltip of a button used to pause updates to the command log, in its off state

data.name: S_LOG_UPDATES_ALT
data.comment: The tooltip of a button used to pause updates to the command log, in its on state

data.name: S_BUTTON_LOG
data.comment: The tooltip of a button used to show / hide the command log

data.name: S_BUTTON_DRIVES
data.comment: The tooltip of a button used to switch to the drive view

data.name: S_BUTTON_PUSH
data.comment: The tooltip of the button used to initiate a push operation

data.name: S_MENU_REFRESH
data.comment: The menu item used to refresh the current location in the file browser

data.name: S_MENU_CUT
data.comment: The menu used to cut files

data.name: S_MENU_CLEAR_LOG
data.comment: The button used to clear the command log

data.name: S_MENU_OPEN_LOCATION
data.comment: The menu used to open the (source) location to a symbolic link

data.name: S_SETTINGS_GROUP_ABOUT
data.comment: The title of the settings about group

data.name: S_EMPTY_APP_DRIVE
data.comment: The notification displayed when the package view is empty

data.name: S_EMPTY_FILTER
data.comment: The notification displayed when a non empty folder / package view is filtered such that no items match

data.name: S_COLUMN_OP_TYPE
data.comment: File operations detailed data grid column name for the type of the operation icon

data.name: S_KILL_SERVER
data.comment: The content of a button to kill ADB server

data.name: S_KILL_PROCESS
data.comment: The content of a button to kill the process of ADB

data.name: S_REFRESH_DEVICES
data.comment: The tooltip of a button to manually refresh the device list

data.name: S_SERVER_DOWN
data.comment: A notification indicating that ADB server is down

data.name: S_MDNS_ON
data.value: mDNS server is up and running
data.comment: A notification indicating mDNS server is on

data.name: S_ROOT_ENABLED
data.comment: The tooltip displayed when root access on the Android device is currently enabled

data.name: S_ROOT_POSSIBLE
data.comment: The tooltip displayed when an Android device supports root access

data.name: S_RECOVERY_MODE
data.comment: The Android recovery mode

data.name: S_DEVICE_REBOOT_TITLE
data.comment: The title of the menu to select a device reboot option

data.name: S_REBOOT_SYSTEM
data.comment: The menu option to reboot the device into the Android system

data.name: S_REBOOT_BOOTLOADER
data.comment: The menu option to reboot the device into the bootloader

data.name: S_REBOOT_SIDELOAD
data.comment: The menu option to reboot the device into side-load mode

data.name: S_REBOOT_SIDELOAD_AUTO
data.comment: The menu option to reboot the device into side-load mode, with auto reboot

data.name: S_STATUS_OFFLINE
data.comment: A device that is no longer online

data.name: S_STATUS_UNAUTH
data.comment: A device that hasn't authorized ADB yet

data.name: S_TYPE_EMULATOR
data.comment: An emulated Android device (other than WSA)

data.name: S_TYPE_WSA
data.comment: Windows Subsystem for Android - an Android emulator by Microsoft, now discontinued

data.name: S_BAT_STATUS_UNKNOWN
data.comment: The battery status indicator when the status is unknown

data.name: S_BAT_STATUS_PLUGGED
data.comment: Battery percentage when device is charging

data.name: S_BAT_SOURCE_WIRELESS
data.comment: Battery charging source indicator - wireless charging

data.name: S_BAT_SOURCE_AC
data.comment: Battery charging source indicator - AC charging

data.name: S_BAT_SOURCE_NONE
data.comment: Battery charging source indicator - no source of charging

data.name: S_BAT_HEALTH_DEAD
data.comment: Battery health indicator - dead

data.name: S_BUTTON_ABORT
data.comment: The content of the button used to abort the extraction process

data.name: S_PASTE_CONFLICT
data.comment: The title of the dialog reporting a merge conflict. 0 = Paste / Drop

data.name: S_DROP
data.comment: The file drop operation

data.name: S_ACTION_OPERATION
data.comment: Used for file operation actions

data.name: S_ACTION_OPERATION_PLURAL
data.comment: Used for file operation actions, plural

data.name: S_ACTION_VALIDATE
data.comment: Validate a file operation, by comparing MD5 of source and target files

data.name: S_FILE_TYPE_LINK
data.comment: A link to an unknown file type

data.name: S_KNOWN_TYPE_LINK
data.comment: A link to a {0} file type

data.name: S_FILE_TYPE_APK
data.comment: The type name for APK files

data.name: S_FILE_TYPE_EXE
data.comment: For executable file type

data.name: S_DRIVE_ROOT
data.comment: The root drive - /

data.name: S_DRIVE_INTERNAL_STORAGE
data.comment: The home / main user space drive

data.name: S_DRIVE_APPS
data.comment: The drive displaying the installed applications

data.name: S_DRIVE_SD
data.comment: A micro SD card drive

data.name: S_DRIVE_OTG
data.comment: A flash drive connected by USB to the device

data.name: S_DRIVE_EMULATED
data.comment: A drive on an emulator device

data.name: S_NAME_ILLEGAL_FS
data.value: File name illegal on target file system: {0}
data.comment: 0 = file name

data.name: S_VALIDATE_MISMATCH
data.comment: The error displayed when validation of a file operation resulted in different MD5 checksums of the source and target

data.name: S_VALIDATE_MISSING
data.comment: The error displayed when during validation of a file operation the file was not found in the target location

data.name: S_LOCATION_PERM_DEL
data.comment: The location displayed in the target column of a permanent delete file operation

data.name: S_PATH_INVALID
data.value: Argument must specify full path of a new or existing settings file.
data.comment: Displayed when an invalid path argument is provided for app launch

data.name: S_CUSTOM_DATA_PATH
data.comment: The title of the error message when an invalid path argument is provided

data.name: S_POPUP_UNIX_NAMING
data.value: Adheres to Unix naming rules (via ADB)
data.comment: Will be shown if a file name doesn't meet Unix naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_RESTRICTED_NAMING
data.value: Adheres to user space naming rules
data.comment: Will show if a file name doesn't meet user space naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_WINDOWS_NAMING
data.comment: Will show if a file name doesn't meet Windows naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_DRIVE_ROOT_NAMING
data.value: Adheres to Windows drive root naming rules
data.comment: Will show if a file name doesn't meet Windows drive root naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_UNIQUE_NAME
data.comment: Will show if a file name isn't unique in the current location, according to the file system naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_SELECTED_WINDOWS_NAMING
data.value: A selected file violates Windows naming rules
data.comment: Will show if a selected file doesn't meet Windows naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_SELECTED_DRIVE_ROOT
data.value: A selected file violates Windows drive root naming rules
data.comment: Will show if a selected file doesn't meet Windows drive root naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_SELECTED_UNIQUE
data.value: Some selected files have conflicting case-insensitive names
data.comment: Will show when selected file names differ only by upper / lower case

data.name: S_POPUP_SELECTED_RESTRICTED_NAMING
data.value: A selected file violates user space naming rules
data.comment: Will show if a selected file doesn't meet user space naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_COPIED_UNIQUE
data.value: Some copied files have conflicting case-insensitive names
data.comment: Will show when copied files' names differ only by upper / lower case

data.name: S_POPUP_COPIED_RESTRICTED_NAMING
data.value: A copied file violates user space naming rules
data.comment: Will show if a copied file doesn't meet user space naming rules

data.name: S_POPUP_NON_FILE
data.value: A selected item is not a file / folder
data.comment: Will show when selecting an item that can't be copied

data.name: S_ROOT_STATUS_TITLE
data.comment: 0 = the status (enabled, forbidden, etc.)

data.name: S_STAT_ROOT_UNCHECKED
data.comment: Root status - it is yet unknown whether the device supports root access

data.name: S_BUTTON_ENABLE
data.comment: Toggle button - enable

data.name: S_BUTTON_DISABLE
data.comment: Toggle button - disable

data.name: S_PLACEHOLDER_HOST
data.comment: The placeholder text for the IP address textbox

data.name: S_PLACEHOLDER_PORT
data.comment: The placeholder text for the connect port textbox

data.name: S_PLACEHOLDER_PAIRING_PORT
data.comment: The placeholder text for the pairing port textbox

data.name: S_BUTTON_PAIR_CONNECT
data.comment: The content of a button to pair and connect a new manually connected device

data.name: S_CLEAR_ALL
data.comment: The tooltip of a button used to clear all textboxes in the connect new device

data.name: S_ADD_NEW_DEVICE
data.comment: The tooltip of the new device icon

data.name: S_DEVICE_UNAUTH_NONAME
data.comment: The name displayed for a device that hasn't authorized ADB yet, and we don't know its name

data.name: S_SERVICE_NONAME
data.comment: The name displayed for a service device for which we don't have a name yet

data.name: S_TOOLTIP_BROWSING
data.comment: The tooltip displayed for the device that is currently open for browsing

data.name: S_DRIVE_FREE_SPACE
data.comment: 0 = free space on drive (in B/KB/MB/GB). 1 = total drive capacity (in B/KB/MB/GB)

data.name: S_DRIVE_PACKAGE_PLURAL
data.comment: The installed apps drive items count display, plural

data.name: S_FILEOP_ERROR
data.comment: 0 = an internal error message

data.name: S_FILEOP_VALIDATED
data.comment: A file operation status - validated

data.name: S_FILEOP_WAITING
data.comment: File operation status - queued (waiting)

data.name: S_FILEOP_FAILED
data.comment: File operation status - failed

data.name: ScrollBar_ScrollHereCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_PageUpCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_PageDownCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_LineUpCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_LineDownCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_PageLeftCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_PageRightCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_LineLeftCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: ScrollBar_LineRightCommand
data.comment: ScrollBar ContextMenu

data.name: S_TOOLTIP_MORE_INFO
data.comment: The tooltip of a button used to display a notification message

data.name: S_LANG_NOTIFICATION_TITLE
data.comment: The title of the notification message about the app language

data.name: S_LANG_NOTIFICATION
data.value: Select your app language of choice in the settings. Translation progress is displayed for the selected language. Please help us localize the app to your language on Weblate.
data.comment: The content of the app language notification message

data.name: S_FILE_SOCKET
data.comment: The socket Unix file type

data.name: S_FILE_BLOCK
data.comment: The block device Unix file type

data.name: S_FILE_CHAR
data.comment: The char device Unix file type

data.name: S_FILE_FIFO
data.comment: The FIFO (First-In First-Out) Unix file type

data.name: S_FILE_UNKNOWN
data.comment: An unknown file type

data.name: S_FILE_BROKEN_LINK
data.comment: A symbolic link that points to a file that doesn't exist

data.name: S_NAV_HISTORY
data.comment: The tooltip of the menu that displays the navigation history

data.name: S_ADD_CURRENT_LOC
data.comment: The button used to add the current location (path) to the saved locations list

data.name: S_SAVED_LOCATIONS
data.comment: The tooltip of the button used to open the saved locations menu

data.name: KILO
data.comment: The notation for KiloBytes when displaying file size or drive usage

data.name: MEGA
data.comment: The notation for MegaBytes when displaying file size or drive usage

data.name: GIGA
data.comment: The notation for GigaBytes when displaying file size or drive usage

data.name: TERA
data.comment: The notation for TeraBytes when displaying file size or drive usage

data.name: PETA
data.comment: The notation for PetaBytes when displaying file size or drive usage

data.name: EXA
data.comment: The notation for ExaBytes when displaying file size or drive usage

data.name: MILLI
data.comment: The notation for milli (Ampere) when displaying battery usage

data.name: MICRO
data.comment: The notation for micro (Ampere) when displaying battery usage

data.name: NANO
data.comment: The notation for nano (Ampere) when displaying battery usage

data.name: BYTES
data.comment: The notation for Bytes when displaying file size or drive usage

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_COPY_TARGET
data.comment: The drag tooltip in copy mode when the target is known. 0 - number of items being dragged, 1 - the destination under the mouse

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_MOVE_TARGET
data.comment: The drag tooltip in move mode when the target is known. 0 - number of items being dragged, 1 - the destination under the mouse

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_LINK
data.comment: The drag tooltip in link mode. 0 - the destination under the mouse

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_MOVE
data.comment: The drag tooltip in move mode. 0 - number of items being dragged, 1 - the destination under the mouse

data.name: S_FILE_PROGRESS_TRANSFER
data.comment: 0 - file size, 1 - transfer time, 2 - speed. ex: 9MB in 1.2s (7.5MB/s)

data.name: S_COMPLETED_FILES_NUM
data.comment: 0 - number of completed files, 1 - total files. ex: 2 of 3

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_COPY_SINGLE
data.comment: The drag tooltip in copy mode. 0 - the item being dragged

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_COPY_TARGET_SINGLE
data.comment: The drag tooltip in copy mode when the target is known. 0 - the item being dragged, 1 - the destination under the mouse

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_MOVE_SINGLE
data.comment: The drag tooltip in move mode. 0 - the item being dragged

data.name: S_DRAGDROP_MOVE_TARGET_SINGLE
data.comment: The drag tooltip in move mode when the target is known. 0 - the item being dragged, 1 - the destination under the mouse

data.name: S_SYNC_NO_CONFIRM
data.comment: The error message displayed when a sync operation has finished but ADB did not provide a confirmation

data.name: S_VALIDATION_ERROR
data.comment: The title of the error message displayed on a file operation validation error

data.name: S_SIDELOAD_ROM_TITLE
data.comment: The title of the open file dialog for selecting a ROM image to sideload

data.name: S_ROM_FILE
data.comment: The filter name displayed in the open file dialog when opening a ROM for sideload

data.name: S_SETTINGS_KEEP_MODIFIED_DATE
data.comment: The name of the setting to enable preserving the "Date Modified" of files on push / pull operations

data.name: S_DRAG_INSTALL_SINGLE
data.comment: The drag tooltip when dragging a single APK file over the installed apps view. 0 - the name of the APK

data.name: S_DRAG_INSTALL_MULTIPLE
data.comment: The drag tooltip when dragging multiple APK files over the installed apps view. 0 - number of APKs being dragged

data.name: S_MDNS_IN_PROGRESS
data.comment: The notification displayed when waiting for a status response from the server

data.name: S_SETTINGS_THUMBNAIL_MODE
data.comment: The title of the setting that controls thumbnail behavior

data.name: S_SETTINGS_THUMBS_ICON_VIEW
data.comment: Thumbnails mode setting: icon view mode

data.name: S_SETTINGS_THUMBS_PHOTO_DIR
data.comment: Thumbnails mode setting: photo directories mode

data.name: S_SETTINGS_THUMBS_CONNECT
data.comment: Thumbnails mode setting: on connection mode

data.name: S_SETTINGS_PERSIST_THUMBS
data.comment: The setting used allow saving thumbnails locally from one app session to another

data.name: S_SETTINGS_THUMBS_THROTTLE
data.comment: The setting used to limit the speed at which thumbnails are pulled in bulk from the device

data.name: S_SETTINGS_SPECIAL_DIR_ICONS
data.comment: The setting used to allow displaying Windows icons for Windows special folders (Downloads, Documents, etc.)

data.name: S_SETTINGS_VIDEO_THUMBNAILS
data.comment: The setting to enable video thumbnails (pull & display)

data.name: S_SETTINGS_THUMBS_AGE
data.comment: The setting used to control how long local persistent thumbnails should be used before updating them

data.name: S_SETTINGS_BUSYBOX
data.comment: The setting used to enable checking connected devices for busybox and which shell commands it supports

data.name: S_SETTINGS_WSA
data.comment: The setting used to enable checking for installed WSA, launching it, and connecting to it automatically

data.name: S_SETTINGS_EMULATOR_DISCOVERY
data.comment: The setting used to enable listing installed AVDs and launching them from the device list

data.name: S_EMULATOR_PKG_TIP
data.comment: Tooltip for an emulator package device tile

data.name: S_EMULATOR_DIALOG_TITLE
data.comment: The title of the dialog message to launch an emulator

data.name: S_EMULATOR_SDK_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Android SDK emulator was not found. Install the Android SDK emulator package or set ANDROID_SDK_ROOT.
data.comment: Error message when the SDK emulator executable cannot be located

data.name: S_THUMB_SNACKBAR_CHECKING
data.comment: A hint displayed for a short time in the snackbar

data.name: S_THUMB_SNACKBAR_PULLING
data.comment: A hint displayed for a short time in the snackbar

data.name: S_THUMB_SNACKBAR_READING
data.value: Reading thumbnail locations and media database
data.comment: A hint displayed for a short time in the snackbar

data.name: S_THUMBSIZE_TOOLTIP
data.comment: The tooltip of the thumbnail size selector. view = icon view / details view

data.name: S_SETTINGS_THUMB_SIZE_PER_LOCATION
data.value: Thumbnail Size Saved For Each Location
data.comment: The setting that enables keeping track of the last thumbnail size selected for each location / folder

data.name: S_SETTINGS_SORTING_PER_LOCATION
data.value: Sorting column & order saved for each location
data.comment: The setting that enables keeping track of the last sorted column and direction selected for each location / folder

data.name: S_SETTINGS_MAX_CUSTOM_THUMB_WEIGHT
data.value: Max Image Size To Use As Its Own Thumbnail (0 - Disabled)
data.comment: The name of the setting that enables using images for their own thumbnail display, and the maximum size for such images

data.name: S_FILEOP_HIDDEN_ITEMS
data.comment: 0 - the number of file operations currently not displayed

data.name: S_DETAILS_PANE_TOOLTIP
data.value: Show or hide the details and preview pane.
data.comment: The tooltip of the button that controls the details pane visibility

data.name: S_SIDE_PANE_PREVIEW
data.comment: Side pane in file preview mode

data.name: S_SETTINGS_PREVIEW_MAX_SIZE
data.comment: The maximum size of a file for preview

data.name: S_SETTINGS_PULL_ON_DOUBLE_CLICK
data.value: Pull To Default Folder On File Double Click
data.comment: The setting that enables pulling a file to the default folder on double click

data.name: S_DETAILS_MULTI_FILE_SELECTED
data.value: Select a single item to get more information.
data.comment: The tip displayed in the details pane when multiple (or none) files are selected

data.name: S_ITEM_LOCATION
data.comment: Location as in parent path of a file

data.name: S_IMAGE_F_STOP
data.comment: The f-stop of an image metadata

data.name: S_IMAGE_ISO
data.comment: The ISO number of the image metadata

data.name: S_IMAGE_EXPOSURE
data.comment: The exposure time in parts of a second of the image metadata

data.name: S_VIDEO_BITRATE
data.comment: The bitrate from the video file metadata

data.name: S_PREVIEW_EMPTY_SELECTION
data.comment: The hint displayed in the preview pane when no file is selected

data.name: S_PREVIEW_INVALID
data.comment: The hint displayed in the preview pane when the selected file(s) cannot be previewed

data.name: S_PDF_PASSWORD_PROTECTED
data.comment: The hint displayed in the preview pane when the selected PDF is password protected

data.name: S_PDF_PASSWORD_WRONG
data.comment: Error shown in the PDF password prompt when the entered password is wrong

data.name: S_PDF_PASSWORD_UNLOCK
data.comment: Button label to submit the PDF password

data.name: S_FILE_PERMISSIONS
data.comment: The title of the permissions section of a file in the details pane

data.name: S_FILE_PERM_USER
data.comment: Unix file permissions for the selected user

data.name: S_FILE_PERM_GROUP
data.comment: Unix file permissions for the group the user is in

data.name: S_FILE_PERM_OTHER
data.comment: Unix file permissions for users outside the group

data.name: S_DATE_ACCESSED
data.comment: File info - last access date

data.name: S_CREATION_TIME
data.comment: File info - creation time

data.name: S_FILE_INFO_MODIFIED
data.comment: File info - date modified (but without "date")

data.name: S_FILE_SYSTEM
data.comment: The file system type of a drive

data.name: S_MOUNT_POINT
data.comment: The Unix mount point of a drive

data.name: S_MOUNT_OPTIONS
data.comment: The Unix mount options of a drive

data.name: S_COLOR_RED
data.comment: The label of the red channel in the color picker

data.name: S_COLOR_GREEN
data.comment: The label of the green channel in the color picker

data.name: S_COLOR_BLUE
data.comment: The label of the blue channel in the color picker

data.name: S_ADB_NOT_FOUND
data.value: Unable to locate ADB from system PATH. Please use "{0}" to locate it.
data.comment: 0 - the name of the Override ADB Path setting

data.name: S_ADB_PATH_INVALID
data.value: Provided {0} path is either a Windows shortcut or a UNC (remote) path, which is not allowed.
data.comment: 0 - either "ADB" or nothing

data.name: S_ADB_COMPROMISED
data.value: The provided executable cannot be verified as ADB. Make sure you download only official Android Platform Tools from Google.

data.name: S_BUTTON_PAIR
data.comment: The button for pairing a device

data.name: S_SETTINGS_KILL_ADB_ON_EXIT
data.comment: The setting that enables killing ADB server when closing the app

data.name: S_CUSTOM_LOCATION_INVALID
data.value: The custom location cannot be under C:\Users\…\AppData - please select another location
data.comment: An error displayed when choosing a wrong custom app data location

data.name: S_SETTINGS_DISABLE_ADB_LIMITATIONS
data.comment: The setting that allows using ADB without integrity checks and without path restrictions
